ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* City of birth of the player */,
  "birth_state" TEXT /* State of birth of the player */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Country of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for height and weight (e.g., feet, inches, pounds) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the player */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the player */,
  "current_team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, retired, etc.) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the college is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the college is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the college is located */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., quarterback, running back) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_info" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "overall_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "draft_status" TEXT /* Draft status (drafted, undrafted) */,
  "college_at_draft" TEXT /* College of the player at the time of the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_info_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_college" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation from the college */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "death_city" TEXT /* City of death */,
  "death_state" TEXT /* State of death */,
  "death_country" TEXT /* Country of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is located */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (analyst, coach, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
